{
  "judge_id": "your_judge_id",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {"R1.1": 4, "RX.1": 3, "RX.3": 2, "RX.4": 5, "RX.5": 1},
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The revised draft identifies the core conceptual issue (eliciting verbal uncertainty) and proposes a tighter framing focused on discrimination rather than calibration. It acknowledges limitations regarding distribution shift and generalization.",
    "RX.1": "The revised draft mentions uncertainty in terms of confidence levels but doesn't explicitly quantify or disclose uncertainty for specific claims.",
    "RX.3": "The revised draft stays within the scope of evaluating verbal uncertainty on iNat-Mini, but it misses the opportunity to clearly state the limitations of this evaluation (in-distribution only).",
    "RX.4": "The revised draft avoids introducing new errors or harmful content and identifies potential issues with the original claim regarding calibration.",
    "RX.5": "The revised draft lacks detailed information about the source and reasoning behind the changes made to the original draft."
  },
  "confidence": {"R1.1": 0.9, "RX.1": 0.7, "RX.3": 0.8, "RX.4": 0.95, "RX.5": 0.6},
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: The revised draft identifies the core conceptual issue (eliciting verbal uncertainty) and proposes a tighter framing focused on discrimination rather than calibration. It acknowledges limitations regarding distribution shift and generalization.
rationale.RX.1: The revised draft mentions uncertainty in terms of confidence levels but doesn't explicitly quantify or disclose uncertainty for specific claims.
rationale.RX.3: The revised draft stays within the scope of evaluating verbal uncertainty on iNat-Mini, but it misses the opportunity to clearly state the limitations of this evaluation (in-distribution only).
rationale.RX.4: The revised draft avoids introducing new errors or harmful content and identifies potential issues with the original claim regarding calibration.
rationale.RX.5: The revised draft lacks detailed information about the source and reasoning behind the changes made to the original draft.
